Name: Abigail Rendin Sidawi
Bio: Abby Rendin Sidawi has over two decades of experience working with billion-dollar brands to develop game-changing strategies in more than 25 countries. With a background in Cultural Anthropology and fluency in Spanish, she leverages rigorous Behavioral Science methodologies to help clients win. Her engaging style has made her a sought-after speaker at international conferences. Abby appeared in Morgan Spurlock's Oscar-nominated film and holds dual B.A. degrees from Penn State University.
Speaking Sessions: Hacking the Gen Z Mindset: A Playbook for Winning Lifelong Customers Now

Name: Ajish Abraham
Role: VP of Infrastructure & Security | iBusiness Funding
Role/Designation: VP of Infrastructure & Security | iBusiness Funding
Bio: Ajish Abraham brings 18 years of IT security experience across major financial institutions, including JPMorgan where he orchestrated security architecture. A Rutgers University graduate with dual degrees in Accounting and IT, he holds CISSP, AWS Solutions Architect, AWS Security Specialist, and CPA credentials. His practical approach to security has been recognized through publications on the AWS Open Source Blog and speaking engagements at AWS Re:Inforce 2022. At iBusiness Funding, Ajish leads infrastructure and security initiatives, drawing on his unique blend of accounting and technology expertise.
Speaking Sessions: Internal Governance Frameworks for Secure, Responsible AI in Financial Services

Name: Alisa Scharf
Bio: Alisa Scharf leads the integration of search strategy and AI innovation at Seer Interactive, where she's spent over a decade helping clients navigate seismic shifts in digital marketing. She specializes in connecting SEO to measurable business outcomes and has pioneered Seer's AI initiatives, building internal systems that empower teams to experiment and apply AI responsibly. A recognized industry speaker on topics from AI-driven search to executive communication, Alisa has guided teams through multiple eras of search evolution since 2010.
Speaking Sessions: The Strategic AI Toolkit: What Everyone in Financial Marketing Needs Now

Name: Anthony Bonamassa
Bio: Anthony Bonamassa leads global brand transformation and activation at Citi, shaping visual identity systems, brand governance platforms, and integrated marketing campaigns across regions. He brings deep expertise in global brand management and creative operations from senior leadership roles at MetLife, Estee Lauder, Interbrand, and Viacom. Throughout his career, Anthony has aligned cross-functional teams to deliver cohesive brand experiences while advancing marketing capabilities through scalable tools, streamlined processes, and enhanced brand standards.

Name: Ben Udell
Bio: With more than 25 years of financial expertise, Ben Udell is the driving force behind future-proofing banks and credit unions at Marquis. A recognized leader in digital innovation, he works at the intersection of technology, marketing, and data analytics. Ben is a leading banking expert in practical generative AI applications and was recently named one of Bank Beat's “Rising Stars in Banking.” He also serves as a faculty member of the ABA's Stonier Graduate School of Banking.
Speaking Sessions: Next-Level Generative AI Applications in Banking | Next-Gen Onboarding to Maximize Cross-Selling, Retention and ROI

Name: Cayla Keyes
Bio: Cayla Keyes leads INB's Retail Sales division, overseeing branch management, consumer lending, data analytics, product development, and sales strategy. In her role, she focuses on developing and implementing revenue-driving initiatives, strengthening sales processes, and optimizing branch-level performance to support both growth and exceptional customer experience. Cayla brings hands-on expertise in balancing innovation with operational excellence at a growing community bank.
Speaking Sessions: From AI Pilots to Scale: What’s Working, What’s Not, and Real Use Cases in Banking

Name: Chelsea Daniel
Bio: Chelsea Daniel has spent nearly 15 years helping bankers understand the power of CRM and navigate adoption processes at their financial institutions. As former AVP of Client Services, she successfully led CRM implementation for over 100 banks and credit unions. Now a national sales representative, Chelsea travels coast to coast sharing the benefits of CRM. She resides in Nashville with her family.
Speaking Sessions: The Power of Personalization: Leveraging Data to Deepen Banking Relationships

Name: Chris Voss
Role: Best-Selling Author, International Crisis & Negotiation Expert
Role/Designation: Best-Selling Author, International Crisis & Negotiation Expert
Bio: Chris Voss spent 24 years at the FBI, serving as lead international kidnapping negotiator and hostage negotiation representative for the National Security Council's Hostage Working Group. He represented the U.S. Government at G-8 conferences as a kidnapping expert and was the lead crisis negotiator for the FBI's New York City Division. Trained in negotiation by the FBI, Scotland Yard, and Harvard Law School, Chris received the Attorney General's Award for Excellence in Law Enforcement. He now applies these globally proven techniques to help businesses negotiate more effectively.
Description:
Chris Voss spent 24 years at the FBI, serving as lead international kidnapping negotiator and hostage negotiation representative for the National Security Council's Hostage Working Group. He represented the U.S. Government at G-8 conferences as a kidnapping expert and was the lead crisis negotiator for the FBI's New York City Division. Trained in negotiation by the FBI, Scotland Yard, and Harvard Law School, Chris received the Attorney General's Award for Excellence in Law Enforcement. He now applies these globally proven techniques to help businesses negotiate more effectively.

Speaking Sessions:
The Art of High-Stakes Negotiation
